SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT (VIETNAM)

This Shareholders Agreement (this "SHA") is entered into among:
- Saigon Holdings Joint Stock Company, as Founder (the "Founder");
- Mekong Capital Fund III, as Investor (the "Investor"); and
- Mr Nguyen Van Anh (CCCD: 001202012345), as Management Shareholder.

Mr Nguyen Van Anh shall serve as CEO. The Investor shall receive 30% of the issued
share capital for consideration of VND 850 billion. Confidential.

Contact: nguyen.vananh@saigon.vn
